all.name: Danish Intelligence
all.description: Unified NFO-Hunter, OldBoys Proxy, and DanskArr Autopilot.
all.longDescription:
Apple-Clean Media Intelligence

The Danish Intelligence Core is a unified service that handles everything Danish for your media stack in one place. It replaces three separate containers (dksubs-proxy, ob-proxy, and danskarr) with a single, high-performance engine.

  • Auto-Config: Automatically 'paints' Custom Formats and Quality Profiles onto your Radarr and Sonarr instances.
  • NFO Hunter: Real-time vetting of releases for Danish audio and subtitles.
  • OldBoys Proxy: Integrated translator for the OldBoys Newznab indexer.
  • DanskArr Autopilot: Background proactive hunting for missing Danish content.

Simply install, and the service will automatically discover your Arrs and wire everything up.
